_comment_mode: Use 'Discover' first to list projects and find GUIDs. Then switch to 'Export'.
_comment_launcher: Full path to LogikalStarter.exe on THIS machine (must run on same machine as Logikal)
_comment_programmode: Login program mode. 'erp' is typical for ERP export - confirm with the customer.
_comment_guid: GUID of the project to export. Run in Discover mode first to find this.
_comment_output: Folder where the exported SQLite file will be saved. Created automatically if it doesn't exist.
